title: oeceoclades calcarata
intro: Oeceoclades calcarata, also known as the "calcarata orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the genus Oeceoclades, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Oeceoclades calcarata include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat a range of ailments in traditional African medicine.
